label.description: the name of the connection (for example: corticospinal_tract)

carries.description: the kinds of occurrent this conduit conducts

transform.description: OPTIONAL. ABSENT asserts the conduit is TRANSMISSIVE. PRESENT names the Causal Relation Object the conduit performs upon what it carries, asserting the conduit is COMPUTATIONAL.

realized_by.description: 3.0.0 OPTIONAL. A scheme-qualified REFERENCE, by identity, to the native law or signal that REALIZES this conduit's transform (for example a native rate law a computational conduit stands for, or a runtime signal a transmissive conduit stands for). It is a reference, not an embedded law - the native dynamics stay native; the standard only records the binding. ABSENT (unbound) is legal and identity-preserving; a conduit that carried no realized_by in 2.0.0 keeps its identifier under 3.0.0.
